expectations.text: Uses force create element_like spring_damper (not single_component_force or bushing)
Explains that spring_damper is for 1-DOF along a line of action
expectations.evidence: Response states: 'spring_damper is the right choice here because you have a 1-DOF spring and damper acting along a single line of action between two markers. If you needed a 6-DOF compliant connection (e.g., a rubber mount), you would use bushing instead.'
